title: openclaw/openclaw
content: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞

highlights: Your own personal AI assistant
Any OS. Any Platform
The lobster way

title: obra/superpowers
content: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
summary: obra/superpowers 是一个代理技能框架和软件开发方法论，强调其有效性。
highlights: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

title: affaan-m/ECC
content: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
summary: ECC 是一个针对 Claude Code、Codex、Opencode、Cursor 等 AI 编码代理的性能优化系统，专注于技能、本能、记忆、安全及研究优先的开发。
highlights: The agent harness performance optimization system.
Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development.
For Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.

title: NousResearch/hermes-agent

title: n8n-io/n8n
content: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities. Combine visual building with custom code, self-host or cloud, 400+ integrations.
summary: n8n是一个公平代码的工作流自动化平台，具备原生AI能力，支持可视化构建与自定义代码结合，可自托管或使用云服务，拥有400多个集成。
highlights: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities
Combine visual building with custom code
self-host or cloud
400+ integrations

title: ultraworkers/claw-code
content: An agent-managed museum exhibit, built in Rust with Gajae-Code / LazyCodex — developed and maintained with no human intervention.

built in Rust with Gajae-Code / LazyCodex
developed and maintained with no human intervention

title: multica-ai/andrej-karpathy-skills
content: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.
summary: 该项目提供了一个基于Andrej Karpathy对LLM编码陷阱观察的CLAUDE.md文件，用于优化Claude Code的行为表现。

title: anomalyco/opencode
summary: OpenCode 是一个开源的编码代理项目，旨在提供自动化的代码生成和辅助编程功能。

title: Significant-Gravitas/AutoGPT
content: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone, to use and to build on. Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters.

title: ollama/ollama
content: Get up and running with Kimi-K2.6, GLM-5.1, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.

highlights: Get up and running with Kimi-K2.6, GLM-5.1, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.

title: $100 AI Music Video: Claude Fable 5 vs. GPT-5.6 Sol
content: Article URL: https://www.tryai.dev/blog/ai-music-video-arena-claude-vs-gpt-5.6 Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48939524 Points: 272 # Comments: 373
summary: 文章比较了使用Claude Fable 5和GPT-5.6 Sol以100美元预算制作AI音乐视频的效果，基于Hacker News上的讨论（272分，373条评论），探讨了两者在创意、质量和成本效益上的差异。
highlights: 标题: $100 AI Music Video: Claude Fable 5 vs. GPT-5.6 Sol
Hacker News讨论获得272分和373条评论

title: AI Data Centers and the Concentration of Wealth
summary: 文章探讨了AI数据中心建设与财富集中的关系，指出大规模AI基础设施投资可能加剧经济不平等，并引发对资源分配和社会影响的担忧。
highlights: AI数据中心的巨额投资可能进一步集中财富
资源分配不均加剧社会不平等
AI基础设施的扩张引发对经济影响的讨论

title: Why teens deserve access to safe AI
content: Learn how OpenAI is making ChatGPT safer for teens with age-appropriate protections, learning tools, parental controls, and expert partnerships.
summary: OpenAI 正在通过年龄适宜的保护措施、学习工具、家长控制和专家合作，使 ChatGPT 对青少年更安全。
highlights: OpenAI is making ChatGPT safer for teens with age-appropriate protections
learning tools, parental controls, and expert partnerships

title: How Cars24 scales conversations and builds faster with OpenAI
content: Cars24 uses OpenAI-powered voice and chat agents to handle 1M+ monthly conversation minutes, recover 12% of lost leads, and bring agentic workflows to teams across the company.
summary: Cars24利用OpenAI驱动的语音和聊天代理，每月处理超过100万分钟的对话，挽回12%的流失线索，并在公司各团队中引入代理工作流。
highlights: handle 1M+ monthly conversation minutes
recover 12% of lost leads
bring agentic workflows to teams across the company

title: NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Embed Ranks #1 Overall on RTEB, Advancing Agentic Retrieval
summary: NVIDIA的Nemotron 3 Embed模型在RTEB基准测试中整体排名第一，推动了智能体检索技术的发展。
highlights: NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Embed ranks #1 overall on RTEB

title: Newer Models, Same Advantage
summary: 文章探讨了新一代AI模型如何延续并强化了早期模型的优势，分析了技术进步带来的性能提升和应用扩展。
highlights: Newer models build upon the same foundational advantages, achieving greater efficiency.
The evolution of AI models demonstrates consistent improvement in key metrics.
Advancements enable broader real-world applications without losing core strengths.
